ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
OR( AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Staged"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Not Available"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Declined") ), Service__r.RecordType.DeveloperName = "Client Request" ), AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Loaded"), ISPICKVAL( Service__r.SubType__c , "Will Call"), Service__r.RecordType.DeveloperName = "Client Request"
))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This Status is not allowed for a Client Request Service or the Client Request Service has a Sub Type of "Will call"
